name: Arlington Super Pawn & Gun
description_short: Multi-location pawn shop across the DFW metroplex offering collateral-based loans up to $20,000 and cash payouts for jewelry, electronics, watches, firearms, and designer items with no credit check.
description_long:
Arlington Super Pawn is part of the Super Pawn network, a Texas-based pawn operation with multiple locations across the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex including Arlington, Dallas, and Irving. The company has established itself as a licensed, insured pawn lender serving thousands of customers seeking quick access to cash against valuable collateral. The Arlington location is situated at 2701 W Pioneer Pkwy in Dalworthington Gardens, TX with phone support at 817-795-5600.

Super Pawn specializes in collateral-based lending and buying across a diverse range of items including precious metals (gold, silver, diamonds), luxury watches (Rolex, Omega, Cartier, Patek Philippe), jewelry, firearms from major manufacturers, musical instruments, electronics, designer accessories, and tools. The company offers loans ranging from $20 to $20,000 with same-day funding, online appraisals through their website, and a mobile app for loan monitoring and payments. They operate as both a lender and buyer, allowing customers to either take loans against items or sell items outright for cash.

The company differentiates itself through rapid transaction times (completion in under 5 minutes claimed), no credit checks required (only valid ID needed), transparent pricing with no hidden fees, expert staff appraisals, and 24/7 online estimate availability. Their website emphasizes convenience with multiple location options, a professional online application process, and customer testimonials highlighting fair valuations compared to competitors. The 4.9/5 star rating based on 1,131 reviews suggests consistent customer satisfaction, particularly around sales transactions and staff professionalism.

A critical caveat is that pawn lending, while faster than traditional credit, inherently carries the risk of losing collateral if loans aren't repaid. The company's marketing emphasizes luxury item sales rather than providing transparent APR information for loans, which is standard industry practice but limits comparison to regulated lending products. This is appropriate for customers with valuable items seeking immediate cash, but unsuitable for those without assets to pledge or those seeking credit-building opportunities.
address: 2701 W Pioneer Pkwy, Dalworthington Gardens, TX 76013

company_info.headquarters: 2701 W Pioneer Pkwy, Dalworthington Gardens, TX 76013

pros: Fast same-day payouts within 10 minutes with no credit check required
High loan ceiling of up to $20,000 accommodates larger collateral valuations
Multiple convenient locations across DFW (Arlington, Dallas, Irving) with extended service hours
Expert appraisals on luxury items including Rolex watches, designer bags, and fine jewelry
Transparent pricing with explicitly stated no hidden fees policy
Online estimate tool available 24/7 for pre-assessment before visiting locations
Mobile app for loan monitoring and payment management from anywhere
cons: Risk of losing collateral entirely if loan terms aren't met within pawn period
Website does not disclose APR or loan term details, limiting transparency compared to regulated lenders
No credit-building benefit—pawn loans don't report to credit bureaus
Limited to customers with valuable items; excludes those without collateral to pledge
Relies on staff appraisals which may not match resale market values
best_for: Individuals with valuable items (jewelry, watches, electronics, firearms) needing immediate emergency cash
People selling luxury goods who want expert appraisals and competitive pricing
Those unable to access traditional credit who have valuable collateral to pledge
Customers seeking quick short-term loans without credit bureau involvement
diagnosis: Arlington Super Pawn is best for individuals holding valuable items who need rapid cash access without credit approval processes. The primary caveat is that pawn lending involves collateral risk and provides no credit-building benefit—it's a short-term liquidity solution, not a credit-building or long-term financing tool. Suitable only for those with significant assets to pledge and clear repayment capacity.
services: Pawn loans up to $20,000 on jewelry, watches, firearms, and electronics
Cash outright purchases of gold, diamonds, luxury watches, and designer accessories
Online appraisals and instant quotes for items via website form
No-credit-check lending requiring only valid government-issued ID
Mobile app for loan account monitoring and payment processing
Firearms sales and pawn services for regulated gun purchases
Musical instrument evaluation and lending (guitars, drums, brass instruments)
Designer accessory and luxury watch authentication and buying (Gucci, Louis Vuitton, Rolex, Cartier)
Electronics purchasing (Apple products, gaming systems, cameras, TV equipment)
Precious metals services (gold coins, bullion, dental gold, scrap gold)
Same-day transaction completion with instant cash
In-store and online selling options through eBay integration
